name: Healthy Spinach Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen spinach, drained and chopped
1 package (package) of fat-free ranch salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the spinach, mayonnaise, sour cream, onions, and ranch salad dressing.
2. Refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight for best flavor.
